programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Colin Jackson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sams regulars are enticed away to a new neon-lit bar that comes complete with free food and dancing girls. Woodys marriage seems to be in trouble, and Carla looks for another job. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norms boozing expertise secures him his dream job as chief beer-taster at a brewery, while Rebecca grows addicted to the bars new slot machine. George Wendt stars alongside Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sams reputation is tested by Henris challenge to decide who is the more accomplished ladies man, and the battle to collect the most telephone numbers turns into an international contest between America and France

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Live coverage of the opening events on day seven of the Games in Italy, including the start of the mens giant slalom at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, which will see ParalympicsGBs Neil Simpson go for a medal after winning bronze in this event at the 2023 Lleida World Championships

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live

programme.desc: Helen Whately MP, Shadow Secretary of State for Work and Pensions, sets out the Conservative Partys plan to get more people into work

programme.title: Inside the Worlds Most Luxurious Cruises
programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes on board some of the worlds most luxurious cruise ships, featuring a floating art gallery boasting a multi-million-pound collection and how pets are as pampered as their owners on board the Queen Mary 2. A passenger on his first-ever clipper voyage faces his fear of heights to fulfil a childhood dream as he climbs the mast of a tall ship

programme.title: Greg Davies: The Back of My Mums Head
programme.desc: Stand-up comedy with the Man Down star, recorded at the Lowry in Salford. Stung by his mothers suggestion that he is not normal, Greg puts everyone else under the microscope in a petty quest to discover if anyone actually is. The tour received rave reviews and was extended to 94 dates, including multiple sell-out nights at Londons Hammersmith Apollo and Southbank Centre

programme.title: Bill Baileys Remarkable Guide to the Orchestra
programme.desc: The comedian joins forces with Oscar-winning composer Anne Dudley to investigate some of the finer nuances of orchestral performance. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. How will he respond to free spirit Sophia and her palm-reading talents?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.sub-title: Best Naughty Bits: Breaking Nude Ground
programme.desc: A look back at the times that the unique dating show has broken new ground, featuring stories from across the spectrum of gender and sexuality. They also watch the news coverage of an asteroid passing between the Earth and the moon. First shown in March 2023

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Halloween-inspired tales featuring the all-American family. Springfield becomes the target of an alien invasion and Homer is transformed into a gigantic jelly-like creature, rampaging through the town and leaving a trail of destruction in his wake. Featuring the guest voice of Dr Phil

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When bad weather closes the school, Murray makes Adam and Barry shovel snow off the path, but the boys take advantage of their dad when they discover that he has a fear of snow. Beverly finds Ericas college application, in which she praises her mother as her hero, but Erica is far from pleased about it. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to join the school tennis team in order to stay close to his best friend Chad. However, when Chad picks Dave Kim as his doubles partner, Adam vows to team up with Barry to beat them in a match. Beverly helps Erica to get through her post-break-up depression in time for Valentines Day. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Danielle and Jordan pull no punches as they go head to head with best man Adam and bridesmaid Laura to relive their knockout, boxing-themed wedding from 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: There is impending chaos in the air when Jay holds a Super Bowl party at the same time as Claire is hosting Haleys baby shower - both events being in Jays house

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron and Mitchell learn that Lilly has started her periods, so they call in reinforcements to give her advice. Phil tells Luke he recently attended a prenatal class with Haley

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couples two children are struggling to save the business from their parents disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff team up to pull Beverly, Barry and Erica out of their shared misery that Lainey has left town. Adams dread of gym class is amplified when Coach Mellors brother, Coach Nick, arrives and uses fear as a motivator. Meanwhile, Coach Mellor prepares for the next stage in his career

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides their street needs another stop sign and pleads her case to the city comptroller. Barry panics when he realises hes neglected his college applications, while Erica struggles with her career choice

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphy house is bursting at the seams when Dylans hippie mom moves in and Claires lonely stepdad Jerry wants to pay them a visit, too. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria attempt to help Manny get over his big break-up with Sherry

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam tries to keep his big interview a secret, but just ends up making Mitch suspicious. Haley cannot wait for a festive glass of wine

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The honeymoons highlight stark contrasts as Gia and Scott wake up smitten and excited for tropical Townsville, while Mel and Luke remain distant, heading to a cold and uncomfortable getaway

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Lido, Anna Vincenzos and Le Bistro
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the restaurants he tried to save, returning to Lido, Anna Vincenzos and Le Bistro to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family wins a once-in-a-lifetime safari trip to Africa. However, when Homer enrages a hippo at a Masai party, the jaunt soon becomes an adventure, involving a trip over the Victoria Falls in a ceremonial shield, a carnivorous plant, coconut Molotov cocktails and a chimp refuge thats not all that it seems

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The same day is shown from three different perspectives as Bart is pursued by gangsters, Lisa makes a bid to win the school science fair with a talkative robot, and Marge accidentally slices off Homers thumb. Featuring the guest voices of Frankie Muniz and Joe Mantegna

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the American comedy following the lives of three branches of an extended family, featuring Jay, a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, and gay couple Mitchell and Cam, who are getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Ice-Cream of Margie (With the Light Blue Hair)
programme.desc: Homer is fired from the power plant and secures a job as an ice-cream man, but gets so wrapped up in his new career that he puts his marriage in jeopardy. Meanwhile, Marge discovers a new skill as an expert sculptor, using an unusual medium - lollipop sticks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes Nelsons best friend and revels in the protection his new status brings. Unfortunately, the situation means he is unable to see Milhouse - forcing the pair to meet in secret. Meanwhile, Homer becomes addicted to one of Lisas fantasy books

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another selection of spooky stories, including parodies of Bambi and Parasite, and a tale of a tree coming to life after Homer chops it down

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Chris is forced to admit that Brook is ticking all of his boxes, Gia weighs up taking an intimate step with Scott after years of celibacy, while Alissa and David make the most of their mountain escape

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Single mum and occasional poet Frankie hits it off with primary school teacher Charlie, but will he still be interested when she reveals she has children? Olive and Terence are both in their eighties and havent given up on finding someone special. As they bond over memories of lost loves, tennis and amateur dramatics, Olive hopes Terence will ask her to the theatre. Divorcee Karen, 34, is pleased that Mitch seems to tick all the boxes, while 25-year-old Anita has drawn up a checklist in her search for a perfect match. Her blind date is international rugby player Max, who has never been in a relationship but wants to settle down

programme.desc: Phil feels emasculated when Bill wows Dylan and Luke with heroic tales. He gets them over for some male bonding, but it goes rather wrong

programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and his friends are recruited to the William Penn Academy baseball team. Barry remains in denial about his pitching skills, while Geoffs father interferes in his relationship with Erica

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs new company puts her up at a new luxury apartment with full amenities - and a list of high-profile residents that everyone is eager to take advantage of, without her knowing. Meanwhile, Luke and Manny head straight for the gym to try to pick up older women and end up in hot water. Guest starring Courtney Cox and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa for her first manicure at the salon, where they debate whether a woman can be smart, beautiful and powerful all at the same time. Four tales featuring strong women from history and literature are retold with Selma appearing as Elizabeth I, Lisa as Snow White, Marge as Lady Macbeth and Maggie as Howard Roark from The Fountainhead

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An outbreak of food poisoning at Krusty Burger is traced to barley produced in a nearby town of Norwegian immigrants and results in the mills being shut down, so the out-of-work residents venture to Springfield to find new jobs. However, when xenophobia starts to spread, Mayor Quimby decides to shut the borders

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant that often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners lazy attitude. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer helps Ned build a Christian amusement park called Praiseland as a lasting monument to Maude Flanders. Unfortunately, it meets with an unenthusiastic response - until a seemingly genuine miracle occurs

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Manny takes time out to play with Luke, before having a heart-to-heart with stepsister Claire. Gloria goes shopping for a dress with Alex, and Phil urges Jay to fly his new model aeroplane with him. Comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes away to Marges favourite childhood holiday destination, which has unfortunately changed since she was last there. Homer spurs the locals into sprucing the place up, but an exuberant firework display wrecks everything, forcing him to make amends by becoming a fisherman

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.desc: The honeymoons highlight stark contrasts as Gia and Scott wake up smitten and excited for tropical Townsville, while Mel and Luke remain distant, heading to a cold and uncomfortable getaway

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zekes, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Sketch covers up Stes shoddy Egyptian-themed tattoo that was originally done in a downstairs toilet by a Hells Angel, while Jay is given free rein to design a cover for Jake, who has upset his girlfriend and his mother with his ill-advised ink. Amy calls on Alice to help regain her body confidence after having a mastectomy, while Harley needs the fixers help before he wears a kilt at his wedding, and Kara needs to lose the inappropriate emoji that could cost her a place in the police force

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Jo Brand demonstrates an impressive grasp of street slang, Katy Wix uses a long part of her body to steal something sweet and David Baddiel takes a sledgehammer to a tricky problem

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Mitchell Modell, CEO of Modells Sporting Goods, goes incognito among his employees. He poses as a contestant on a fake reality TV show, and tries learn more about the people working for his company, which has been in his family for four generations since its founding by his great-grandfather in 1889

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Kat Cole goes undercover among the workforce of her company Cinnabon Incorporated, which serves sweet treats from more than 900 bakeries in 40 countries worldwide. Kat has come a long way after being raised by a single mother who fed her family of three girls on $10 a week. She seeks advice from her old boss, former Hooters CEO Coby Brooks, who also went undercover, in his own organisation. Kat has some lofty goals for Cinnabon to become a worldwide food brand, and wants to make sure that the new products she has put in place are working before she implements her plans

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Swansea and Bridgend compete to throw the best dinner party. Kathy and Justin kick off the competition with an Italian-inspired menu, which is overshadowed by Pauls poor table manners and tactless banter. Mark and Maria are the next to host and serve their leftovers-inspired starter, chicken lettuce boats. Finally, its time for Kathy to wreak revenge during Paul and Sarahs evening. Chaos in the kitchen ensues, culminating in a showdown at the table

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cumbria is the location for three more couples to demonstrate their cooking and hosting skills, kicking off with teachers Rory and Sam, who serve up dishes inspired by Europe. Day two sees Sarka and Paul lay on a Czech menu, but the massive portions defeat everyone - except the ever-hungry Rory. Finally, its the turn of John and Sally with their retro 1980s evening. Which couple will win the cash prize of £1,000?

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work more makeover magic. Will helping their homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch? New parents Ela and Noam want to move out of their party pad and into a family home. But they cant do that until their current place can be sold for a high price. First the brothers must fashion their walk-in wardrobe into a bedroom. Can they give this home a stunning stylish makeover?Short:New parents Ela and Noam are looking for a family home. But first the brothers must fashion their walk-in wardrobe into a bedroom. Can they give their home a stylish makeover?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Essex groom Gary plans an underwater wedding 200 miles from home, but his bride-to-be Lauren dreams of celebrating her big day in the Home Counties

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Craig decides to plan an Oktoberfest-themed wedding, but his uncompromising fiancee Sofia dreams of a boho beach wedding day

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: John Wilson, the President and Chief Operating Officer of Rollins Incorporated - the parent company of eight pest-control firms including flagship brand Orkin - goes undercover. He poses as a contestant on a reality TV competition who is trying to win money for his own business, and works alongside his employees to make sure the organisation is heading for another century of keeping homes rodent-free

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Randy DeWitt, the CEO and co-founder of bar and grill chain Twin Peaks, goes undercover to find out whether the companys culture is keeping up with its rapid growth. Posing as a contestant on a reality TV competition, he works among his own staff

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to the River Rock Inn in Milford, Pennsylvania, where owner Ken Pisciotta is struggling to attract guests and battling huge debts. programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling

programme.desc: Martins questionable behaviour shows no signs of stopping as he becomes obsessed with a plastic bag thats stuck up a tree. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples based in Manchester take part in the dinner party competition. programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back south Londoner Daniel wants to get his wedding grooving like a Caribbean street carnival. While Sabrina pictures a tranquil location, Daniel splashes the cash on trucks and sound systems

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Beauty queen and bride-to-be Yasmin has her heart set on a fairy-tale wedding. Powerlifter Yiannis is taking Yasmins dream to the extreme, but will she be the belle of the ball, or will the nuptials have an ugly twist in the tale?

programme.title: Naked Attraction

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Single mum and occasional poet Frankie hits it off with primary school teacher Charlie, but will he still be interested when she reveals she has children? Olive and Terence are both in their eighties and havent given up on finding someone special. As they bond over memories of lost loves, tennis and amateur dramatics, Olive hopes Terence will ask her to the theatre. Divorcee Karen, 34, is pleased that Mitch seems to tick all the boxes, while 25-year-old Anita has drawn up a checklist in her search for a perfect match. Her blind date is international rugby player Max, who has never been in a relationship but wants to settle down

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.sub-title: Best Naughty Bits: The Good, the Bad and the Kinky

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam tries to develop an acting career, a talent agent decides hes only suitable for nerd roles, so Beverly makes it her mission to turn him into a teen heartthrob. Barry decides to embrace the punk rock lifestyle, and Murray attempts to get more involved in Ericas life

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Inspired by the Karate Kid films, Adam and the other Adam Goldberg decide to face off in a karate match to settle their long-running feud once and for all. Later, Barry and Adam ask Uncle Marvin for some martial arts training - but the only thing they learn is how to do his cleaning

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Jai and Leanne, best man Pells and father of the bride Bruce look back at their unforgettable sky high wedding in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch, Cam and Phil crash Jays annual hiking trip to find an elusive eagle after Gloria asks them to keep an eye on him, while Alex, Claire and Haley plan a baby shower

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil feels emasculated when Bill wows Dylan and Luke with heroic tales. He gets them over for some male bonding, but it goes rather wrong

programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and his friends are recruited to the William Penn Academy baseball team. Barry remains in denial about his pitching skills, while Geoffs father interferes in his relationship with Erica

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Assisted by Geoff, Erica and Valley Erica find a new band member to replace Lainey, but Barry convinces Geoff that the new musician is trying to steal Erica from him. Adam and Murray each plot to get out of going to Valentines Day dinner with Beverly

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs new company puts her up at a new luxury apartment with full amenities - and a list of high-profile residents that everyone is eager to take advantage of, without her knowing. Phil is on a mission to review the restaurants famous sliders for his food blog, while Mitch and Cam sneak in separately to meet David Beckham. Meanwhile, Luke and Manny head straight for the gym to try to pick up older women and end up in hot water. Guest starring Courtney Cox and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil pays a visit to his dad to make sure he is okay after hearing some concerning news about him. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch some of their old childhood memorabilia, which prompts them to revaluate a long-held memory of their first family vacation

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in an affluent area so their children can have a good education when Springfield Elementary is rated the worst school in the state. Bart wastes no time in establishing a bad-boy persona, and increases Lisas popularity by telling people she knows a pop star. With the voice of Elliot Page (Juno)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa for her first manicure at the salon, where they debate whether a woman can be smart, beautiful and powerful all at the same time. Four tales featuring strong women from history and literature are retold with Selma appearing as Elizabeth I, Lisa as Snow White, Marge as Lady Macbeth and Maggie as Howard Roark from The Fountainhead

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An outbreak of food poisoning at Krusty Burger is traced to barley produced in a nearby town of Norwegian immigrants and results in the mills being shut down, so the out-of-work residents venture to Springfield to find new jobs. However, when xenophobia starts to spread, Mayor Quimby decides to shut the borders

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant that often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer helps Ned build a Christian amusement park called Praiseland as a lasting monument to Maude Flanders. Unfortunately, it meets with an unenthusiastic response - until a seemingly genuine miracle occurs

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Marge and the kids hitch a ride on a train, where they are entertained by a tramp who tells them a series of colourful yarns based on American folklore - all of which feature characters suspiciously reminiscent of Homer

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Manny takes time out to play with Luke, before having a heart-to-heart with stepsister Claire. Gloria goes shopping for a dress with Alex, and Phil urges Jay to fly his new model aeroplane with him. Comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchells mother tries to make amends for the incident at Jay and Glorias wedding but no one is happy to see her, and the whole family has dinner at Claires house. American comedy, guest starring Shelley Long

programme.sub-title: Kill Gil, Volumes I and II
programme.desc: Department store Santa Gil grants Lisas Christmas wish, but loses his job as a result. Feeling guilty, the family offers him a bed for the night - but he promptly moves in, along with all of his belongings. As the uninvited lodger becomes a pest, Marge looks for ways to get rid of him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes away to Marges favourite childhood holiday destination, which has unfortunately changed since she was last there. Homer spurs the locals into sprucing the place up, but an exuberant firework display wrecks everything, forcing him to make amends by becoming a fisherman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe is faced with a difficult choice when Evergreen Terrace develops a traffic problem

programme.title: Married at First Sight UK
programme.desc: Familiar faces return for a dinner party where some celebrate romance, but others face old tensions. One husband confronts his ex-wife over a shocking revelation, while a former bride finds herself in the eye of the storm as shes pulled into the centre of another couples conflict, sparking a fiery showdown

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The latest run kicks off with stag and hen nights, as a fresh group of hopeful singles take their final steps toward marrying strangers

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The weddings erupt into chaos when Luke forgets the rings, leaving Mel struggling to move past a rocky start and setting an awkward tone for their reception

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The honeymoons highlight stark contrasts as Gia and Scott wake up smitten and excited for tropical Townsville, while Mel and Luke remain distant, heading to a cold and uncomfortable getaway

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barrys membership of a friendship group is jeopardised and a family swear jar is introduced. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Barry starts checking out the best medical schools, Lainey reveals she has won a scholarship to art college. Erica and Adam start to suspect that Murray loves the family dog Lucky more than them

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: High school lovebirds Maria and Ryan, his best man Tavis and Marias sister Veronica are together again on camera for the first time since their school-themed wedding in 2016

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: Brand new: The teams are each given one of the five best challenges from previous seasons, competing not against each other, but instead against the team that won the task

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire help out with their childrens school projects, while Gloria and Cameron spend quality time together. Elsewhere, Mitchell and Manny learn they have more in common than they thought during a trip to watch a meteor shower with Jay. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zekes, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.sub-title: Best Naughty Bits: Breaking Nude Ground

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa for her first manicure at the salon, where they debate whether a woman can be smart, beautiful and powerful all at the same time. Four tales featuring strong women from history and literature are retold with Selma appearing as Elizabeth I, Lisa as Snow White, Marge as Lady Macbeth and Maggie as Howard Roark from The Fountainhead

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An outbreak of food poisoning at Krusty Burger is traced to barley produced in a nearby town of Norwegian immigrants and results in the mills being shut down, so the out-of-work residents venture to Springfield to find new jobs. However, when xenophobia starts to spread, Mayor Quimby decides to shut the borders

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. The business in run by Dr Una Morris, a micro-managing owner who also works at a radiotherapy clinic next door, and is determined to introduce hospital-style techniques to the kitchen by sealing everything in plastic bags

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Eagle Rock in California to try to change the fortunes of Capri, a grubby restaurant that often remains closed during lunchtime because of the twin owners lazy attitude. A crisis ensues as soon as Gordon instructs the duo to clean the place, revealing that only tough measures are likely to save the business

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer helps Ned build a Christian amusement park called Praiseland as a lasting monument to Maude Flanders. Unfortunately, it meets with an unenthusiastic response - until a seemingly genuine miracle occurs

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Marge and the kids hitch a ride on a train, where they are entertained by a tramp who tells them a series of colourful yarns based on American folklore - all of which feature characters suspiciously reminiscent of Homer

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Manny takes time out to play with Luke, before having a heart-to-heart with stepsister Claire. Gloria goes shopping for a dress with Alex, and Phil urges Jay to fly his new model aeroplane with him. Comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchells mother tries to make amends for the incident at Jay and Glorias wedding but no one is happy to see her, and the whole family has dinner at Claires house. American comedy, guest starring Shelley Long

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in an affluent area so their children can have a good education when Springfield Elementary is rated the worst school in the state. Bart wastes no time in establishing a bad-boy persona, and increases Lisas popularity by telling people she knows a pop star. With the voice of Elliot Page (Juno)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa for her first manicure at the salon, where they debate whether a woman can be smart, beautiful and powerful all at the same time. Four tales featuring strong women from history and literature are retold with Selma appearing as Elizabeth I, Lisa as Snow White, Marge as Lady Macbeth and Maggie as Howard Roark from The Fountainhead

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An outbreak of food poisoning at Krusty Burger is traced to barley produced in a nearby town of Norwegian immigrants and results in the mills being shut down, so the out-of-work residents venture to Springfield to find new jobs. However, when xenophobia starts to spread, Mayor Quimby decides to shut the borders

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: It is the end of the first week on the coach, and tour guide Brendan has a twist up his sleeve for tonights vote. An argument during a rowing race leaves one couple in jeopardy

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Kill Gil, Volumes I and II
programme.desc: Department store Santa Gil grants Lisas Christmas wish, but loses his job as a result. Feeling guilty, the family offers him a bed for the night - but he promptly moves in, along with all of his belongings. As the uninvited lodger becomes a pest, Marge looks for ways to get rid of him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes away to Marges favourite childhood holiday destination, which has unfortunately changed since she was last there. Homer spurs the locals into sprucing the place up, but an exuberant firework display wrecks everything, forcing him to make amends by becoming a fisherman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe is faced with a difficult choice when Evergreen Terrace develops a traffic problem

programme.title: Married at First Sight UK
programme.desc: Familiar faces return for a dinner party where some celebrate romance, but others face old tensions. One husband confronts his ex-wife over a shocking revelation, while a former bride finds herself in the eye of the storm as shes pulled into the centre of another couples conflict, sparking a fiery showdown

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The latest run kicks off with stag and hen nights, as a fresh group of hopeful singles take their final steps toward marrying strangers

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The weddings erupt into chaos when Luke forgets the rings, leaving Mel struggling to move past a rocky start and setting an awkward tone for their reception

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The honeymoons highlight stark contrasts as Gia and Scott wake up smitten and excited for tropical Townsville, while Mel and Luke remain distant, heading to a cold and uncomfortable getaway

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Chris is forced to admit that Brook is ticking all of his boxes, Gia weighs up taking an intimate step with Scott after years of celibacy, while Alissa and David make the most of their mountain escape

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barrys membership of a friendship group is jeopardised and a family swear jar is introduced. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Barry starts checking out the best medical schools, Lainey reveals she has won a scholarship to art college. Erica and Adam start to suspect that Murray loves the family dog Lucky more than them

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: High school lovebirds Maria and Ryan, his best man Tavis and Marias sister Veronica are together again on camera for the first time since their school-themed wedding in 2016

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: Brand new: The teams are each given one of the five best challenges from previous seasons, competing not against each other, but instead against the team that won the task

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire help out with their childrens school projects, while Gloria and Cameron spend quality time together. Elsewhere, Mitchell and Manny learn they have more in common than they thought during a trip to watch a meteor shower with Jay. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zekes, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Lido, Anna Vincenzos and Le Bistro
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the restaurants he tried to save, returning to Lido, Anna Vincenzos and Le Bistro to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman tries out the cuisine in Charleston, South Carolina, where he is challenged to eat 10 increasingly hot and spicy sushi rolls

programme.title: Man v Food with Casey Webb
programme.desc: Casey Webbs culinary adventures take him to North Carolina. He tries a barbecue bonanza, a burrito and takes part in the undefeated Pierogi team challenge

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes on a tour of eateries in New Orleans, Louisiana, where he stops at a seafood restaurant that serves up creative dishes and tries potato salad with a twist

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: A Mediterranean-style restaurant in Tennessee, a cafe in Minnesota with wild rice French toast, and a turkey dinner in Kentucky

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation
programme.sub-title: Triple D Nation: Fried to Side

programme.title: Cake Boss
programme.sub-title: Cassata, Cheesecakes and Crates of Wine

programme.title: Paul Hollywood: City Bakes
programme.desc: The baker and celebrity chef heads to Americas original seaside resort of Miami, where he creates his own version of Florida key lime pie, using a deceptively simple recipe

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes a meat-free meals, including mixed mushroom cheesesteak sandwiches and Cajun veggies

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes dinner for her father-in-law, Chuck. The menu includes all his favourites, from Chucks enchiladas to quick roasted salsa to apple crisp for dessert

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers a solutions-based guide to make brilliantly easy and delicious meals all cooked in one pan, pot or dish. He begins with a simple frying-pan pasta, a clever twist on a fish pie thats full of flavour with none of the fuss, and a sublime roast lamb feast with a fantastic hack to speed up cooking

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie presents more easy and delicious meals all cooked in just one pan, pot or dish. In this episode, he prepares a super-fast, flavour-packed smoky noodle soup, the cleverest home-made bread in a pan and a chicken and mushroom pie with a time-saving tip for perfect pastry

programme.desc: Ina Garten shares her favourite candy recipes, topped with marshmallows and white chocolate bark

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten creates easy canape recipes - a fresh salmon tartare and sopresatta with cheese in puff pastry

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining contestants pie-making skills are put to the test in a trio of demanding tasks. First, the hopefuls try to impress judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry by making beef Wellington, before creating hand-raised pies during this rounds technical challenge - but several of the cooks run into difficulties as they try to work with a pastry dolly for the first time. Finally, the showstopper challenge sees traditional American pies being prepared - before one more baker is eliminated from the competition. From 2012

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The pressure continues to rise as the contestants pudding-making skills face a stern examination. Their first task involves creating a pair of sponge dishes, before Mary Berry sets the latest technical challenge - recreating her recipe for the meringue-topped dessert queen of puddings. Finally the cooks try to get to grips with the intricacies of baking strudel in the showstopper round - before one of them leaves the competition for good. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins. From 2012

programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Gareth Ward for a tour of Mid Wales. They begin at a cider-tasting, which James uses to dish up some cider-infused apple fritters. Gareth discovers a farm where the Wagyu cattle fed on local beer. Away from the culinary activities, Gareth is challenged to a rally car ride and James demonstrates his dog training prowess with his trusty hound Cooper

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: In Englands first National Park, the Peak District, James is joined by restaurateur Tessa Bramley, who serves him a beef fillet alongside vegetables from her own garden. He also takes part in an unusual contest - hen racing - where he challenges a local lad and world champion to a race. After discovering some award-winning gin, James meets a local forager and samples some of his elderflower wine. Finally, he uses some of the foraged elderflowers to make a delicious dessert

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Mediterranean Adventure
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore the culinary delights of Sardinia, starting out in Cagliari, where everyone is in high spirits for the feast of St Efisio. The bikers join in by cooking a local speciality, almond and orange cakes. They also meet the tuna fishermen of Carloforte and a chef who has a special way of serving up platters of the fish, are shown how to make sheeps black pudding by a group of shepherds and are served a stew by the King of Sardinia

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The quarter-final of the competition sees the remaining amateur bakers tackle biscuit-based challenges. Their first task involves making a large batch of crispbreads - each of which must come up to Mary Berry and Paul Hollywoods exacting standards - before the technical challenge, in which they battle time and temperature to create a set of six chocolate teacakes. The last round sees the hopefuls baking and assembling a gingerbread house, before Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins reveal who has qualified for the 2012 semi-final - and who is going home

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: In Englands first National Park, the Peak District, James is joined by restaurateur Tessa Bramley, who serves him a beef fillet alongside vegetables from her own garden. He also takes part in an unusual contest - hen racing - where he challenges a local lad and world champion to a race. After discovering some award-winning gin, James meets a local forager and samples some of his elderflower wine. Finally, he uses some of the foraged elderflowers to make a delicious dessert

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A hailstorm leaves the Ingalls familys crops in ruin. To recoup the money, Charles and some friendly neighbours - including a light-hearted Englishman - work in a dangerous railroad blasting job. The Englishman, who is employed as a powder-monkey brings both cheer and eventually tragedy to Charles. Caroline, meanwhile, rounds up the farmers wives to salvage whats left of the crops, despite the pessimism that threatens their effort

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.desc: Nellie Oleson snubs Laura and Mary for wearing homespun dresses on their first day at school, so Caroline teaches her sister how to win the bullys friendship

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A hailstorm leaves the Ingalls familys crops in ruin. To recoup the money, Charles and some friendly neighbours - including a light-hearted Englishman - work in a dangerous railroad blasting job. The Englishman, who is employed as a powder-monkey brings both cheer and eventually tragedy to Charles. Caroline, meanwhile, rounds up the farmers wives to salvage whats left of the crops, despite the pessimism that threatens their effort

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: While in Mankato, Charles encounters a drunken Mr Edwards in the midst of a bar fight and brings him to Walnut Grove. To rehabilitate him, he gets him a job at Hansens Mill, and Caroline tries to set him up with widow Grace Snider

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A famous evangelist comes to town, and Olivia hopes the family will let him baptise them. However, John does not approve of the preachers outlook on religion

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy reads Adolf Hitlers book Mein Kampf, and causes uproar when he plans to publish excerpts in the newspaper so the townsfolk will be aware of what is happening in the world

programme.title: Ballykissangel
programme.desc: Emma steals Niamhs car in a fit of rage, while Siobhan shocks Brendan with her plans for a water birth, but decides to go through with it anyway. Light-hearted drama, starring Deirdre Donnelly and Gary Whelan

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: A fortune-teller creates a stir in Ormston, Eddie keeps a vigil at Jeans bedside after she collapses, and Phyllis is shocked to hear a man has been killed in an accident. Elsewhere, Deborah struggles to get Tom on his own to tell him her news, and Aggie cant resist bringing up the past when an offer of a bed for the night solves her homelessness problem. Starring James Bolam and Michael French

programme.title: Doctor Finlay
programme.desc: Janets maternal instincts are aroused by the discovery of a day-old baby abandoned on the doorstep of Arden House. Medical drama, with Annette Crosbie and David Rintoul

programme.title: Rumpole of the Bailey
programme.desc: The crusty barrister visits an old friend while defending a young woman accused of selling cannabis to an undercover policeman. Courtroom drama, with Leo McKern

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar rescues a lamb destined for the spit at a Greek-style feast, conning Henry into giving it a medical discharge and passage back to America, but the celebrations go ahead without the main ingredient when Trapper and Hawkeye come up with a new recipe using tinned meat

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank Burns cracks under the relentless pressure of endless incoming casualties and an attack on the camp, and pops the question to Hot Lips. Comedy, starring Alan Alda

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Henry caters for the pastoral needs of the 4077th with a Shirley Temple film, a barbecue and a sex education lecture, prompted by Hawkeye and Trapper. Comedy, starring Alan Alda, Gary Burghoff, Larry Linville and Wayne Rogers

programme.title: M*A*S*H (1970)
programme.desc: American battlefield surgeons embark on a campaign of drinking, womanising and practical jokes in an attempt to alleviate the horror of the Korean War. programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: In 1997, 78-year-old Jean Schwarzkopf was murdered in Florida. The retirees husband owned a jewellery business - was she murdered for her diamonds?

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: In 2014, 19-year-old Keonte Chavis was murdered and left in woods in Seale, Alabama. With little forensic evidence, police turned to her relatives, in particular her cousin

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Joseph Green Brown was on death row for 13 years before his convictions were overturned. Decades later, he would be charged for the murder of his wife

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: The case of Ali Lowitzer. In 2012, two years after the then 16-year-old vanished, Texas police received a tip that she may have been trafficked. The search turned into a rescue mission

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

Theyve holidayed in this part of the world many times, and have decided that now is the right time to buy their very own property there. The pair have a maximum budget of £180,000 for Craig to work with

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stylist Felicia is the first host for a week of parties in south London, throwing a fashion-themed gathering with a red carpet, a trendy dress code, and a chilli-infused menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host in south London is musician and poet Bernard, whose culinary trip around the world comprises an Italian starter, a Colombian main and a very boozy Japanese pudding

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: TV editor Joe hosts a 1990s evening and is keen to make sure his guests are won over by his humble style as much as his food. But scorched potatoes may wipe the smile off his face

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Next to take up the reins in south London is video director Dean, who plans to knock the socks off his guests with his easy-going ways and a tried-and-tested menu. Whether his fiery prawn saganaki will slay his guests sensitive taste buds and his espresso martini brownies please a tough crowd remains to be seen

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In south London, the final host of the week, yoga teacher and masseuse Helen, serves up a Thai-inspired menu and a zen yoga-themed night for her guests. Helen has struggled with the spicy food served thus far, so decides to bring down the heat and serve up some fruity and fragrant dishes instead

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Bowling Green in Chorlton-cum-Hardy, Manchester, where owner Mark Canny hopes his newly refurbished rooms and head for hosting will secure him success. Guests James and Fiona rave about their room, but Martin and Petra find a few furnishing faults. At dinner, Mark gets his guests giggling, while Andrew and Qidis revelation that theyre big hitters in the five-star hotel world sends everyones expectations sky high. In the morning, Marks Irish breakfast gratifies the guests, but a fridge feud leaves him far from chilled

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Redhill Holidays in Whitbourne near Worcester, a glamping site with pole-perched premier pods - and an unwelcome population of insects

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week comes from the Mode Lytham Hotel in Lytham, Lancashire, where husband-and-wife team Andrew and Qidi Whitaker hope their hotel will bag them best in show

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Villa Farm Cottage in Thornton Curtis in Lincolnshire, where perfectionist Petra Coates and her partner Martin Littlefield run a tight ship. When the guests arrive, the bathroom tiles take Andrew back to his public swimming pool days and Mark has a moan about a missing en suite. In the morning, the guests are spoilt for choice as Petra provides a German cold meat feast followed by an English breakfast cooked by Martin. However, Andrew and Qidis feedback about the tiling leaves Martin and Petra planning to hit back on payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the last time to find out what theyve been paid and settle some scores. Mark from the Bowling Green Hotel questions Martin and Petra about a lack of chairs and then gives Qidi and Andrews noisy fridge comments a frosty reception

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: When Brian started suffering from health problems, the project of restoring his XR2 to show-winning condition ground to a halt - so in step Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw aim to help refrigeration engineer Tim, whose life has been blighted by a cruel genetic condition, as they take on their first ever Honda

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meet Graeme and Melanie who have huge ambitions for a home in Hackney. They plan to build on a tiny twin garage plot with no surrounding land that cost them £275,000 on a traditional Victorian terraced road. Architect Graeme has come up with an unapologetically modernist, bright red-clad design laid out to maximise space over three floors and has set out just 12 months to build it

programme.title: The Antiques Riviera
programme.desc: Foluke is downsizing her home, but parting with her 200 beloved antique boxes is proving a big problem. She needs a buyer bold enough to take the lot. For 86-year-old Ben, a Spitfire flight is the dream of a lifetime - but first he needs to turn his vintage audio kit into £3000 of hard cash. A 700-piece Barbie collection could hold the key to funding urgent house repairs

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man whos having a heart attack but thinks hes just pulled a muscle. He has no history of cardiac issues, but an examination confirms that his heart is blocked. A day out hiking ends badly for a man when he falls and injures his ankle, and the paramedics tea and toast making skills are needed for a diabetic patient.

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: The paramedics find a man experiencing a life-threatening diabetic hypoglycaemia. It takes the efforts of the fire service to reach the patient, and the only way is up a ladder and through an upstairs window. A woman with dangerously low oxygen levels is struggling to breathe, and sleepwalking may be the reason why an elderly woman has fallen and injured her side

programme.title: The Antiques Riviera
programme.desc: Foluke is downsizing her home, but parting with her 200 beloved antique boxes is proving a big problem. She needs a buyer bold enough to take the lot. For 86-year-old Ben, a Spitfire flight is the dream of a lifetime - but first he needs to turn his vintage audio kit into £3000 of hard cash. A 700-piece Barbie collection could hold the key to funding urgent house repairs

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: New staff nurse Sophie attends to 22-year-old chef James, who accidentally stabbed himself in the leg while chopping tomatoes. During an eventful shift, she also uses chest compressions to keep alive another patient and helps 54-year-old Bernard, who was out cold for 10 minutes after falling and banging his head against a car. However, when his family arrives, it turns out he had been drinking

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Consultant Jacqui must act fast when severely underweight baby Jaziah is rushed into resus with breathing difficulties. In paediatric AandE, it is hoped that 18-month-old Charlies urine test results will explain why he has been feeling unwell for five days, while 81-year-old Ronald prepares for a CT scan after suffering a suspected stroke that is affecting his speech

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of favourite investigations from the team. Jimmy Doherty hears about a threat to British juniper berries that could mark the end of gins recent resurgence in popularity, while Kate Quilton delves into the contents of herbal bedtime teas to establish if they really can help people get to sleep more easily. Big oyster fan Matt Tebbutt wonders why he never finds pearls in his seafood platters so sets off for China, where he discovers that pearl production is full of surprises

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Ending their tour of north Wales in search of the perfect pitch, the seasoned campers arrive at The Oyster Farm Caravan Site on Anglesey. Marine biologist-turned-campsite host Shaun welcomes the campers with freshly caught oysters and his own oyster gin, before sending them on an aquatic tour of the nearby Puffin Island. The weeks winner of the coveted plaque and £2,000 cash prize is then announced

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole tries to restore a monkey bike, and Simon OBrien makes use of all his skills as he tries to give new life to an old racing bicycle

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Jasmine Harman pulls out all the stops around the Charente region of western France to find house-hunters Debbie and Guy their perfect forever home where they can start up their own gîte business. With a maximum budget of £135,000, will any of the five properties Jasmine shows them hit the mark?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host in the north east is 45-year-old clothes shop owner Lee, who is hoping to impress her guests with an evening dedicated to her favourite kind of food. She kicks off with a Greek salad, although its unlike most Greek salads that her guests - hairdresser Simon, nurse Sophie, sexual health nurse Jade and emergency planner James - have ever had

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Simon hopes that tried-and-tested nutritious food will impress his guests on the second night in the North East. But not everyone is convinced as Lee has issues with the dessert, while Sophie enjoys grilling the host about the menu

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nurse Sophie hosts the third night in the North East, hoping her fast-food menu and kids party theme will let her guests unleash their inner children and win her the prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth night in the north-east, sexual health nurse Jade throws a Wild West-themed party in a bid to rope her the money. James channels his inner cowboy, complete with authentic-ish American accent, and after some flattering food chat, the gang wonders whether hes on a charm offensive because his night is still to come. After Jade and Simons earlier tiff, everyone watches in anticipation to see whether he will pick her meal apart. With the party in full flow, Lee is shocked to find out Jades job, but the others arent happy with her behaviour around the table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in the north-east, emergency planner James hopes to impress the group with a carefully constructed menu. It being their final meeting, the participants open up and Jade is surprised to learn that Lee had a negative first impression of her. Sophie comes clean about her previous views on host James, which leaves the group members flabbergasted

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Grange Farm Park in Maltby le Marsh, Lincolnshire, which is run by mum and daughter team Ann Graves and Rebecca OBrien. Guests Emily and Warren marvel at their luxury room, while father and son Bis and Deep cant wait to dive into their hot tub. But Marilyn and Neil are concerned that their bathroom might be a bit cramped. After a day out feeding baby seals at a local seal sanctuary, the BandBers congregate at the on-site restaurant for dinner, where Marilyn isnt pleased to find out that she and Neil are the only guests without a hot tub

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Marilyn and Neil Tuson host the second night of the week at Edgecliff Boutique BandB in Birchington-on-Sea, Kent - hoping the breathtaking views will give them the edge they need. Guests Emily and Warren are big fans of their rooms sea views, but Bis and Deep find a dirty kettle and Ann and Rebecca arent happy about a dusty chandelier. Later, in the morning, theres a long wait at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Veras Kitchen and BandB in Lechlade, Gloucestershire, where young owners Warren Neinaber and Emily Mapson hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests check in to the Preston Hotel in Yeovil, owned by father and son Bis and Deep Oozageer. Ann and Rebecca find their room more cheap than cheerful, although an afternoon tasting the produce at a cider brandy distillery proves a massive hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners reunite, ready to air their grievances from throughout the week. Ann and Rebecca from Grange Farm Park arent happy with Marilyn marking them down for the lack of a hot tub, and Marilyn herself isnt too pleased when her and Neil review the feedback for their slow breakfast service at Edgecliff Boutique BandB

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore a Citroën SM - widely considered one of the greatest French cars ever - after it suffered catastrophic engine failure on its first outing

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw head to Norfolk to take on a 1962 TVR Grantura that has been off the road for nearly 50 years

programme.title: The Dog House Australia
programme.desc: Pomeranian Prince is ready to rule his kingdom, but it remains to be seen if the Acton family will be his subjects. Winnies obsession with chewing toys could be his downfall

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Back in 2011, Edward and Hazel Short set out to build an art deco, shining white lighthouse tower with additional bedrooms, guest rooms and infinity pool, all on a rugged but beautiful clifftop in north Devon. It was an ambitious project and quickly ran into problems, not least of which were the apparent breakdown of the couples marriage and a spiral of borrowing and debt, leaving Edward facing bankruptcy. In Frnech

programme.desc: The stories of three mothers who have triumphed over extraordinary adversity. programme.title: 999: On the Front Line

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team revisits favourite investigations, including Kate Quiltons visit to the worlds largest producer of jelly beans to find out what goes into the sweets. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sailing fans Nicole and Lee are planning to move permanently to Aude in the south of France. programme.title: 999: On the Front Line

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A woman with a weak immune system owing to the radiotherapy she underwent for breast cancer is bitten by her cat, a minor injury that could cause her serious problems. programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: TV editor Joe hosts a 1990s evening and is keen to make sure his guests are won over by his humble style as much as his food. But scorched potatoes may wipe the smile off his face

programme.desc: Next to take up the reins in south London is video director Dean, who plans to knock the socks off his guests with his easy-going ways and a tried-and-tested menu. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Bowling Green in Chorlton-cum-Hardy, Manchester, where owner Mark Canny hopes his newly refurbished rooms and head for hosting will secure him success. programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a man whos having a heart attack but thinks hes just pulled a muscle. He has no history of cardiac issues, but an examination confirms that his heart is blocked. programme.title: 999: On the Front Line

programme.sub-title: The Siege of Alesia, Caesars Greatest Victory
programme.desc: The Battle of Alesia, contested in 52 BC towards the end of the Gallic wars, in which Roman forces under the command of Julius Caesar besieged Alesia, within which sheltered a confederation of Gallic tribes united under the leadership of Vercingetorix of the Arverni. After six years of fighting, almost 200 000 warriors came together on the plain. One of the greatest battles in Antiquity was about to commence

programme.title: Egypts Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Part one of two. Over 4,000 years ago, the ancient kingdom of Egypt, collapsed and disappeared. The mighty pharaohs, who had reigned supreme for more than seven centuries, lost control and the land was plunged into 150 years of chaos and civil war. In this documentary, a team of archaeologists examines the Tomb of the Warriors, a rare mass grave dating to the fall of the Old Kingdom, when political infighting and a changing climate brought down an empire

programme.title: Egypts Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Tomb of the Warriors, near Luxor in southern Egypt, contains over 60 mummified bodies, all of which had suffered violent deaths. Though discovered in 1923 before being sealed, the tomb has only recently been investigated for what it can reveal of this lost world

One gets to enjoy a luxurious pampered sauna on a boat in the middle of the city, while the other pedals their way down the worlds longest cycle tunnel

programme.title: Scannal
programme.desc: A look back at a mid-19th-century murder trial that still arouses great interest today. In September 1852, Maria Kirwan was found floating in a remote inlet on Irelands Eye, just off the coast of Howth, County Dublin. Her husband William was found guilty of killing her - but many believe his conviction was due to the moral reaction of society, when it was discovered he had been living with his mistress at the time. Lawyers, writers and experts assess whether or not justice was served

programme.desc: Winston and Ben fight to save Jos life; Teddy supports Link; Owen and Jules battle to save a young man; Lucas forms an unexpected bond with a patient

programme.title: The Newsreader
programme.desc: As Public Eye climbs ever closer to News At Sixs deteriorating numbers, Dale teams up with Rob, pushing the CEO to replace Lindsay. Rob makes a controversial comment on air when discussing apartheid sports boycotts, leaving Helen with a huge problem when she is approached by an Aboriginal activist. Newsroom drama, starring Anna Torv and Sam Reid

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Long-running hospital drama set in a New Zealand accident and emergency ward, following the complicated personal and professional lives of its staff and their families and friends.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mali and Abigail assess their love. Leah makes an announcement. Will David have a change of heart?

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: The teams tackle a layered dessert in the form of mini celebration cakes and a patisserie classic - the Les Miserables, making 24 identical items of each pastry in three and a half hours. After that they create a grand pièce montee with two different flavours of choux buns, producing 80 of each on the theme of the greatest moment in history. Presented by Liam Charles and Stacy Solomon

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: An ambitious couple set out to build a revolutionary eco home in the Cotswolds, which will not only use very little energy, it will also produce four times the energy it needs. Environmental consultant Duncan is planning to manage the project himself, moving out of the London home he shares with solicitor Liz to live near the site. But although he is totally committed, he has never faced anything like this before, and almost inevitably the technically complex 18-month build, while living apart takes its toll on the couple

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal and Ted get involved in yet another bout of rivalry with their counterparts over on Rugged Island - this time by writing a song that will allow them the dubious honour of representing Ireland in the Eurovision-style music contest Eurosong. Ardal OHanlon and Dermot Morgan star

programme.title: First Dates Ireland
programme.desc: Glamorous pharmacy technician Mim is paired with engineer Jack but the odds appear stacked against him - until he reveals he drives a BMW. Esther from Arklow is looking from compassion and cuddles, and hopes that Liam from Dublin may be just the man for her, while Polish born bus driver Marcin from Inchicore dreams of big love with a guy just like himself. But will he find it with his big, bald, bearded doppelganger Cavan, a rugby player from Laois?

programme.title: Derry Girls
programme.desc: The girls have been up all night revising for a big exam - and all of them are convinced they are going to fail. So when an opportunity to get out of the test presents itself, they jump at the chance - especially as it involves spending time with Father Peter, who everyone fancies. Comedy, starring Saoirse-Monica Jackson and Jamie-Lee ODonnell

programme.title: Other Voices
programme.desc: Annie MacManus, Huw Stephens and MayKay present another selection of live performances and interviews from Dingle and west Wales, this week featuring Chalk, Miles Kane, Annie-Dog and Travy

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: In Lincolnshire Rick meets inventor James Dyson, who allows him special access to his futuristic farm, where robots tend to strawberries all year round. Chef Rachel Green cooks Rick traditional plum bread, he also meets pig farmers producing Lincolnshire sausages. He then cooks strawberry sorbet and bangers and mash

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: Amid Belfasts buzzy food scene, Rick tucks into Filipino-style Sunday lunch. On Northern Irelands Atlantic coast, he meets an award-winning chef, with a no waste approach, who turns fish offal and under-used species such as dog fish into stunning dishes. Rick also makes his first Filipino dish, and, after witnessing the dry-ageing of some special Irish beef, cooks beef and Guinness pie

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching For
programme.desc: Eva explores Madrids vibrant food scene, finds out why the city is being dubbed the New Miami and joins the celebrations at the citys gay pride parade

programme.title: The Report (2019)
programme.desc: A senator recruits an idealistic member of her staff to lead an investigation of the CIAs Detention and Interrogation Program created in the aftermath of the September 11 attacks. He is shocked to uncover efforts made in the intelligence service to destroy evidence, subvert the law, and hide a shocking secret from the American public. Fact-based drama, with Adam Driver, Corey Stoll, Annette Bening and Jon Hamm
