programme.desc: An art collector battles with two beautiful women in a story laced with greed and deceit. Drama, starring Joseph Cotten, Gloria Grahame and Maureen OBrien

programme.title: Classic FMs Rising Stars with Julian Lloyd Webber 2021
programme.desc: A showcase for five young classical musicians, featuring violinist Esther Abrami, trumpeter Lucienne Renaudin Vary, violinist Randall Goosby, guitarist Sean Shibe and pianist and cellist Jeneba Kanneh-Mason

programme.title: Battle of the Irish Dancers
programme.desc: Documentary following dedicated dancers and their teachers as they prepare for the Irish Dancing Championships. Focusing on the drama and dedication of the sport along with the strength, endurance and agility required of the dancers

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the Academy Award-winning Francis Ford Coppola, whose films include The Godfather franchise and Apocalypse Now

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the American actress, who starred in The Witches of Eastwick, Thelma and Louise and Bull Durham and won an Academy Award for her role in Dead Man Walking

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A trickster gets her comeuppance after playing an evil joke at the expense of a caring couple. Drama, starring Elaine Strich and Shane Rimmer

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man discovers a vintage wine and impulsively gambles that no one will be able to name it. Drama, starring Ron Moody and Anthony Carrick

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Rich American Howard Latimer visits London and bets £1,000 that he can spend the night in a room that is said to be haunted.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: When Clara Nash is murdered, her babysitter Lottie Slocum is excited to be the centre of attention, and also hopes to become closer to Claras husband

programme.title: Guy Garvey: From the Vaults
programme.desc: The Elbow frontman introduces music from the TV archives from 1976, featuring Sex Pistols, the Clash, Kiss, Heart, Tom Waits, the Walker Brothers, Albert Hammond and Rod Stewart. Guy also looks back at classic performances from the likes of Procol Harum, the Kinks, Be-Bop Deluxe and David Essex, as well as interviews with Patti Smith and Diana Ross

programme.title: John and Yoko: Above Us Only Sky
programme.desc: The story of John Lennons album Imagine, released in 1971, exploring how the art, politics and music of the pair are intrinsically entwined. Featuring interviews with Yoko Ono, Julian Lennon, David Bailey, John Dunbar, Dan Richter and Eddie Veale, some of whom have never spoken publicly on film before, as well as previously unseen footage of Lennon and Ono from their private archive

programme.title: How the Beatles Changed the World
programme.desc: Through exclusive interviews and a wealth of rarely seen footage, this film reveals the previously untold story of how four young men from Liverpool transformed the world for ever

programme.title: Elton John: Million Dollar Piano
programme.desc: The musician plays a selection of his greatest hits, recorded during his residency at the Colosseum at Caesars Palace, Las Vegas. Featuring performances of Rocket Man, Crocodile Rock, Tiny Dancer, Goodbye Yellow Brick Road, Im Still Standing and Circle of Life

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of a sale of the Queen frontmans personal effects at Sothebys in London, telling his story through the items up for auction. Spanning art, fashion, musical instruments, personal papers and possessions, candid photographs, furniture, and jewels, accrued over the course of 50 years, the sales allowed the public to bid for a piece of rock n roll history

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: A sale at Bonhams features swords from the English Civil War and letters revealing the extent of the love affair between David Ormsby-Gore and Jackie Kennedy

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: In London, Christies auctions Francesco Guardis Rialto Bridge painting, while Sothebys sells Turners view of the fortress at Ehrenbreitstein, valued at £15m

programme.title: Opera Norths Resonance
programme.desc: Somewhere by musician Nwando Ebizie and director Juliet Ellis, who connect as dancer Jahmiah Simpson floats between the waking world and the dream world

programme.title: Classic FM Live - Great British Classics
programme.desc: A concert at the Royal Albert Hall in which Ben Palmer conducts the Philharmonia Orchestra in a selection of music by British composers, including Vaughan Williams and Elgar

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: By persuading a surgeon to perform a macabre experiment, a man continues to dominate his wife after his death. Elaine Stritch and Marius Goring star

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When her policeman husband Patrick callously announces that he is leaving her, Mary Marney strikes out and kills him with the frozen leg of lamb she has bought for their dinner. When attending the scene, officers are unable to determine nor find the murder weapon. Susan George and Brian Blessed star

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A landlady appears kind and friendly - but her last two guests disappeared two years ago. Siobhan McKenna and Leonard Preston star

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A woman is cut down to size by her husbands loyal butler when it is discovered she is having an affair. Drama, starring John Gielgud, Joan Collins and Peter Bowles

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A housewife befriends a stray cat and suddenly finds her life begins to change. Drama, starring Joseph Cotten and Wendy Hiller

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Herc and Carver arrest a driver after witnessing him picking up a large amount of cash from known gang members, but are forced to return the money when the mans political connections to a senator are revealed. After his apartment is raided and van torched, Omar takes revenge in a street encounter with Wee-Bey and Stinkum

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: An upset Bill is spurred into action by Sookies revelation concerning the abuse she suffered as a child. Jason travels to Fangtasia searching for V, Tara reluctantly agrees to pay for an exorcism for her mother, and three vampires turn up at Merlottes to convince Bill to join their group. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin and Stephen Moyer

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Cersei and Tywin plot the next move for the Lannisters and the Crown after Tommens coronation, while Ser Jorah gives Daenerys worrying news about the situations in Yunkai and Astapor. Jon and his band of volunteers mount a raid on the mutineers at Crasters Keep, and Sansa and Littlefinger arrive at the Eyrie. Fantasy drama, starring Lena Headey, Charles Dance, Emilia Clarke and Kit Harington

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The Laws of Gods and Men
programme.desc: Stannis and Davos arrive in Braavos for their meeting with the Iron Bank, but find Tycho Nestoris (Mark Gatiss) a hard man to do business with. Yara Greyjoy leads a band of Ironborn on a mission to rescue her brother Theon, while Daenerys meets with supplicants in Meereen. In Kings Landing, Tyrions trial begins in the throne room and he is stunned by the identity of one of the crowns witnesses. Fantasy drama, starring Stephen Dillane and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion enlists an unlikely ally, while Daario entreats Daenerys to allow him to do what he does best. Jons warnings about the Walls vulnerability fall on deaf ears, while Brienne and Pod follow a new lead as they continues their mission to track down the Stark girls. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Kit Harington and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Luke and Bess accompany Oliver to Pauls office for his final session before moving away. Paul talks to the divorcing couple for the last time, and believes he may have found some hope for the future - but discovers Oliver is still furious with him. Drama, starring Gabriel Byrne and Aaron Shaw

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Lord and Lady Fitzalan Howard try to impress American guests at Carlton Towers with a programme of traditional activities, including skinning rabbits and taking high tea. Meanwhile, Sir Humphry Wakefield entertains tourists on a wine-tasting weekend at Chillingham Castle

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming heads across the Irish Sea to Dublin, where he succumbs to the citys famous charm and meets some of its most fascinating characters. On a journey that takes in an 18th-century pleasure house and a burlesque life-painting class, Alan also stops off in Temple Bar for a pint with singer Sharon Corr, unlocks a mystery in Irelands oldest library and uncovers a stylish secret that lurks behind the steel shutters of an old lock-up

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Glasgow, one of his favourite cities, to reveal unusual and often hidden sights and sounds overlooked by the public. Starting at the Necropolis, he travels to the worlds oldest music hall before enjoying the views from a city-centre landmark. He also finds the time to take tea with a film star

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony believes Big Pussy is an informant, and gives Paulie the task of uncovering the truth. Junior conspires with Livia when he suspects his nephew is plotting against him

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Tony is numbed by an increased dose of antidepressants, until he sees a beautiful stranger in his neighbours yard. Junior sends two hitmen to kill his nephew and AJ is stressed over a formal dance. Crime drama, starring James Gandolfini

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Ray, Ani and Paul draw closer to the killer, while struggling to keep a lid on their own messy problems. Crime drama, starring Colin Farrell

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Ray, Ani and Paul take precautionary measures to elude detection and untangle a dark mystery, while Frank deals with the fallout of his betrayal. Crime drama, starring Colin Farrell

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Frank Semyon, Ray Velcoro and Ani Bezzerides weigh their options as Nic Pizzolatto wraps up his tale of murder in downtown Los Angeles, revealing both the identity of Casperes killer, and the scope of the corruption the trio must deal with. Thriller, starring Vince Vaughn, Colin Farrell and Rachel McAdams

programme.title: True Detective
programme.sub-title: The Great War and Modern Memory
programme.desc: The disappearance of a young Arkansas boy and his sister in 1980 triggers vivid memories and enduring questions for retired detective Wayne Hays, who worked the case 35 years before with partner Roland West. Nic Pizzolattos crime anthology, starring Mahershala Ali, Stephen Dorff and Carmen Ejogo

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Hays looks back at the aftermath of the 1980 Purcell case, including possible evidence left behind at an outdoor hangout for local kids. As attention focuses on two conspicuous suspects, the parents of the missing children receive a cryptic note

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Hays recalls the early days of his romance with Amelia, and some of the cracks that began to show after they married and had children together. Back in the present day, ten years after the Purcell crimes took place, Hays is presented with a second chance to vindicate himself and the investigation

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: West and Hays think they may have found a connection between the local church and the Purcell crimes, and Woodard finds himself targeted by a vigilante group

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: The third series of Nic Pizzolattos crime anthology continues. Wayne finds himself in a no-win situation as new clues emerge in the Purcell case

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: The third series of Nic Pizzolattos crime anthology continues. Wayne and Roland revisit discrepancies in the Purcell case that have been hidden or forgotten over the years

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion enlists an unlikely ally, while Daario entreats Daenerys to allow him to do what he does best. Jons warnings about the Walls vulnerability fall on deaf ears, while Brienne and Pod follow a new lead as they continues their mission to track down the Stark girls. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Kit Harington and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: The Bear
programme.desc: Award-winning chef Carmen Carmy Berzatto returns from New York City to his hometown of Chicago to run his late brother Michaels failing Italian beef sandwich shop. He attempts to retrain the employees, but is faced with resistance. Comedy drama, starring Jeremy Allen White

programme.title: The Bear
programme.desc: A surprise health inspection reveals the cracks in the restaurants foundation, while Carmy goes head to head with Richie. Comedy drama, starring Jeremy Allen White

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sledges division is sent to assist the attack on a fortified position in Okinawa. As they struggle through the muddy landscape, they encounter horrific evidence of the conflicts impact on Japanese civilians, and struggle to reconcile their duties with the suffering of the regions people. Second World War drama, starring Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The Marines return home following the Japanese surrender, but a demoralised Sledge struggles to cope with the horrors he saw during the campaign. Leckies relationship with his parents deteriorates, and Lena meets Basilones family for the first time. Conclusion of the Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale and Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Avon and rival drug trafficker Proposition Joe hold an Eastside versus Westside basketball game, giving the detectives the first glimpse of their elusive target. Freamon shows Prez and Sydnor how to trace the Barksdale finances and Herc and Carver misplace money they take from Wee-Bey. Omar continues looking for a way to get to Avon and makes a deal with Joe

programme.title: True Blood
programme.sub-title: The Fourth Man in the Fire
programme.desc: Jason and his new friend Amy follow Lafayette to his source of V, while Bill agrees to let Eric borrow Sookie for an evening to use her mind-reading powers to root out a thief. Taras mother Lettie Mae feels like a new woman following her exorcism, prompting Tara to consider undergoing one herself. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin, Stephen Moyer and Ryan Kwanten

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrions fate is decided as his champion Oberyn Martell faces against Gregor the Mountain Clegane in his trial by combat, while Moles Town is on the receiving end of a raid by the wildlings. Ramsay sends Theon into Moat Cailin to negotiate the surrender of the Ironborn troops holding the fort, Littlefinger and Sansa are questioned about the circumstances surrounding Lysas death and Barristan confronts Jorah about a document delivered to him. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The men of the Nights Watch face their biggest challenge yet as they prepare to defend the Wall and Castle Black against attacks from the north and south by Mance Rayders wildling army, with Ygritte determined to be the one to kill Jon Snow. Sam gets some sage advice about love from Maester Aemon and is shocked when someone comes knocking at the gates seeking shelter. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington and directed by Neil Marshall, the man behind the second series episode depicting the Battle of the Blackwater

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The Penningtons, owners of Muncaster Castle in the Lake District, discuss the challenges of housing three generations of their family under one roof, while elderly patriarch Patrick struggles to find new purpose following the death of his wife. At Maunsel House in Somerset, Sir Benjamin Slades preconceptions are challenged when a gay mens choir arrives for a weekend break

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the worlds highest swimming pool

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Artie learns the identity of the person who burned down his old restaurant, while Tony tells Livia he knows about her part in the attempt on his life

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.sub-title: Guy Walks into a Psychiatrists Office
programme.desc: With Uncle Junior in prison, Tony is now sole head of the professional waste disposal business and FBI interest is mounting. Meanwhile, Christopher causes problems by selling phoney stock to senior citizens

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Van Aldens grasp on sanity becomes increasingly tenuous, and he begins to suspect Sebso is lying about Billy Winslows death - so he decides to test his colleagues integrity. Jimmy goes to visit his sick father, and quizzes Gillian about his childhood. Meanwhile, Nuckys nerves mount as the election looms, Angela plans her escape, and Rothstein anxiously meets with his solicitor. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky faces an uphill battle as election day arrives, with his candidate trailing in the polls and the DAlessios still at large, while Margaret makes a tough choice about her future. Elsewhere, the Darmodys assess their marriage, the net closes in on the Commodores poisoner, and a disgusted Van Alden prepares to leave Atlantic City behind. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky is forced to use his diplomatic skills to manage the aftermath of an attack on Chalkys warehouse by the KKK. Van Alden takes his wife Rose on a tour of Atlantic City, Jimmy receives advice from both Nucky and the Commodore, and Angela fears Gillian is squeezing her out of her familys life. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Michael Pitt, Kelly Macdonald and Michael Kenneth Williams

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Agents continue to investigate Nuckys dealings during the election, leaving him struggling to work out who betrayed him - while Margaret resourcefully tries to limit the damage. Kaestner gives Eli a history lesson, Chalky makes a new enemy and Rothstein searches for suitable trading partners. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: The Commodore exploits his connections within the Coast Guard to throttle Atlantic Citys liquor supply - so Nucky responds by calling in a favour from Washingtons new attorney general, Harry Daugherty. Irish republican Owen Sleater sets about proving his worth by intercepting a delivery, but his actions put more pressure on Lolly Steinman. Meanwhile, Margaret reveals her secret to the household staff, and Lucy struggles to cope with her loneliness

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Jimmy and Mickey find themselves with a surplus of liquor and decide to take advantage by expanding their operations into new territories. Nucky discovers his lawyer may have found a way to fend off the corruption charges, Eli fears the Commodores leadership abilities are on the wane, Chalky comes under pressure at home and at work, and Owen decides to demonstrate his expertise. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi and Michael Shannon

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky decides to tell his enemies what they want to hear - before springing a surprise at a Memorial Day service. Eli questions his allegiances as his options start to dwindle, Jimmy is taught a painful lesson by one of the Commodores associates and Richard Harrow goes hunting in the forest

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky orchestrates a risky liquor delivery in Philadelphia - but in Atlantic City, attorney general Daugherty encounters a problem that could complicate the electoral fraud investigation. Leander Whitlock, the Commodores lawyer, takes Jimmy under his wing, while Van Alden is plagued by his conscience as Lucy struggles to live in solitude

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrions fate is decided as his champion Oberyn Martell faces against Gregor the Mountain Clegane in his trial by combat, while Moles Town is on the receiving end of a raid by the wildlings. Ramsay sends Theon into Moat Cailin to negotiate the surrender of the Ironborn troops holding the fort, Littlefinger and Sansa are questioned about the circumstances surrounding Lysas death and Barristan confronts Jorah about a document delivered to him. programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The men of the Nights Watch face their biggest challenge yet as they prepare to defend the Wall and Castle Black against attacks from the north and south by Mance Rayders wildling army, with Ygritte determined to be the one to kill Jon Snow. Sam gets some sage advice about love from Maester Aemon and is shocked when someone comes knocking at the gates seeking shelter. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington and directed by Neil Marshall, the man behind the second series episode depicting the Battle of the Blackwater

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: After meeting at the cornhole party, Clark quickly hits it off with Floyds wife Carol. Later, detectives Homer and Plumb dig deeper into Clarks relationship with Carol, and Floyds time on the DTF app

programme.title: The Time Travelers Wife
programme.desc: Henry and Clare try to reset with a second date, but she still struggles to rectify this Henry with the man she knows and loves. Starring Rose Leslie and Theo James

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: In the wake of the showdown, the members of the now-disbanded Task Force continue to seek answers. As the Dark Hearts mobilise to cover their tracks, a shocking revelation leads them to a final confrontation

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: McNulty and Daniels debate how to protect a key witness in the months before he testifies. Meanwhile, Sydnor and Carver track down the Barksdale crews main stash house, and Prez demonstrates his talent for following the paper trail. Proposition Joe brokers a meeting between Omar and Stringer, while an undercover operation has terrible consequences for one of the unit

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Bill breaks a taboo by protecting Sookie, who identified the man responsible for stealing from Fangtasia. Jason and Amy abduct a vampire to harvest his blood, and Tara consults with Miss Jeanette to cure her own problems. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin and Stephen Moyer

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon Snow heads into the wildling camp to try to negotiate a peace with Mance Rayder, but an unexpected arrival changes the situation at the Wall, while Daenerys is forced to make a decision about the dragons in Meereen. Cersei demands that Tywin call off her engagement to Loras Tyrell, Bran learns more about his destiny, and Tyrion receives a visit from Jaime as he awaits his fate. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: At Castle Black, Jon Snow struggles to mediate between wildling leader Mance Rayder and Stannis Baratheon, while a mournful Cersei continues to worry about the future of her son Tommen in Kings Landing. Tyrion arrives in a new location and is presented with a fresh opportunity and Daenerys grapples with the politics of power in Meereen, as well as her tempestuous dragons. Starring Kit Harington, Lena Headey, Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Walter attends his final session, and believes everything has worsened since his previous visit. He denies having a breakdown and reveals how his father never allowed him to to cry in front of his mother, even to mourn the death of his brother. Paul suggests he has created two versions of himself and that the real Walter does not wish to return to work, and the patient feels worried he has not lived his life for himself. Drama, starring John Mahoney and Gabriel Byrne

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

Back in the present day, ten years after the Purcell crimes took place, Hays is presented with a second chance to vindicate himself and the investigation

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: West and Hays think they may have found a connection between the local church and the Purcell crimes, and Woodard finds himself targeted by a vigilante group

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: The third series of Nic Pizzolattos crime anthology continues. Wayne finds himself in a no-win situation as new clues emerge in the Purcell case

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: The third series of Nic Pizzolattos crime anthology continues. Wayne and Roland revisit discrepancies in the Purcell case that have been hidden or forgotten over the years

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrion enlists an unlikely ally, while Daario entreats Daenerys to allow him to do what he does best. Jons warnings about the Walls vulnerability fall on deaf ears, while Brienne and Pod follow a new lead as they continues their mission to track down the Stark girls. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage, Kit Harington and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: The Bear
programme.desc: Award-winning chef Carmen Carmy Berzatto returns from New York City to his hometown of Chicago to run his late brother Michaels failing Italian beef sandwich shop. He attempts to retrain the employees, but is faced with resistance. Comedy drama, starring Jeremy Allen White

programme.title: The Bear
programme.desc: A surprise health inspection reveals the cracks in the restaurants foundation, while Carmy goes head to head with Richie. Comedy drama, starring Jeremy Allen White

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sledges division is sent to assist the attack on a fortified position in Okinawa. As they struggle through the muddy landscape, they encounter horrific evidence of the conflicts impact on Japanese civilians, and struggle to reconcile their duties with the suffering of the regions people. Second World War drama, starring Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The Marines return home following the Japanese surrender, but a demoralised Sledge struggles to cope with the horrors he saw during the campaign. Leckies relationship with his parents deteriorates, and Lena meets Basilones family for the first time. Conclusion of the Second World War drama, starring James Badge Dale and Joseph Mazzello

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: Avon and rival drug trafficker Proposition Joe hold an Eastside versus Westside basketball game, giving the detectives the first glimpse of their elusive target. Freamon shows Prez and Sydnor how to trace the Barksdale finances and Herc and Carver misplace money they take from Wee-Bey. Omar continues looking for a way to get to Avon and makes a deal with Joe

programme.title: True Blood
programme.sub-title: The Fourth Man in the Fire
programme.desc: Jason and his new friend Amy follow Lafayette to his source of V, while Bill agrees to let Eric borrow Sookie for an evening to use her mind-reading powers to root out a thief. Taras mother Lettie Mae feels like a new woman following her exorcism, prompting Tara to consider undergoing one herself. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin, Stephen Moyer and Ryan Kwanten

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrions fate is decided as his champion Oberyn Martell faces against Gregor the Mountain Clegane in his trial by combat, while Moles Town is on the receiving end of a raid by the wildlings. Ramsay sends Theon into Moat Cailin to negotiate the surrender of the Ironborn troops holding the fort, Littlefinger and Sansa are questioned about the circumstances surrounding Lysas death and Barristan confronts Jorah about a document delivered to him. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The men of the Nights Watch face their biggest challenge yet as they prepare to defend the Wall and Castle Black against attacks from the north and south by Mance Rayders wildling army, with Ygritte determined to be the one to kill Jon Snow. Sam gets some sage advice about love from Maester Aemon and is shocked when someone comes knocking at the gates seeking shelter. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington and directed by Neil Marshall, the man behind the second series episode depicting the Battle of the Blackwater

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The Penningtons, owners of Muncaster Castle in the Lake District, discuss the challenges of housing three generations of their family under one roof, while elderly patriarch Patrick struggles to find new purpose following the death of his wife. At Maunsel House in Somerset, Sir Benjamin Slades preconceptions are challenged when a gay mens choir arrives for a weekend break

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the worlds highest swimming pool

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.desc: Artie learns the identity of the person who burned down his old restaurant, while Tony tells Livia he knows about her part in the attempt on his life

programme.title: The Sopranos
programme.sub-title: Guy Walks into a Psychiatrists Office
programme.desc: With Uncle Junior in prison, Tony is now sole head of the professional waste disposal business and FBI interest is mounting. Meanwhile, Christopher causes problems by selling phoney stock to senior citizens

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Van Aldens grasp on sanity becomes increasingly tenuous, and he begins to suspect Sebso is lying about Billy Winslows death - so he decides to test his colleagues integrity. Jimmy goes to visit his sick father, and quizzes Gillian about his childhood. Meanwhile, Nuckys nerves mount as the election looms, Angela plans her escape, and Rothstein anxiously meets with his solicitor. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky faces an uphill battle as election day arrives, with his candidate trailing in the polls and the DAlessios still at large, while Margaret makes a tough choice about her future. Elsewhere, the Darmodys assess their marriage, the net closes in on the Commodores poisoner, and a disgusted Van Alden prepares to leave Atlantic City behind. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky is forced to use his diplomatic skills to manage the aftermath of an attack on Chalkys warehouse by the KKK. Van Alden takes his wife Rose on a tour of Atlantic City, Jimmy receives advice from both Nucky and the Commodore, and Angela fears Gillian is squeezing her out of her familys life. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi, Michael Pitt, Kelly Macdonald and Michael Kenneth Williams

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Agents continue to investigate Nuckys dealings during the election, leaving him struggling to work out who betrayed him - while Margaret resourcefully tries to limit the damage. Kaestner gives Eli a history lesson, Chalky makes a new enemy and Rothstein searches for suitable trading partners. Prohibition-era drama, starring Steve Buscemi and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: The Commodore exploits his connections within the Coast Guard to throttle Atlantic Citys liquor supply - so Nucky responds by calling in a favour from Washingtons new attorney general, Harry Daugherty. Irish republican Owen Sleater sets about proving his worth by intercepting a delivery, but his actions put more pressure on Lolly Steinman. Meanwhile, Margaret reveals her secret to the household staff, and Lucy struggles to cope with her loneliness

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Jimmy and Mickey find themselves with a surplus of liquor and decide to take advantage by expanding their operations into new territories. Nucky discovers his lawyer may have found a way to fend off the corruption charges, Eli fears the Commodores leadership abilities are on the wane, Chalky comes under pressure at home and at work, and Owen decides to demonstrate his expertise. Drama, starring Steve Buscemi and Michael Shannon

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky decides to tell his enemies what they want to hear - before springing a surprise at a Memorial Day service. Eli questions his allegiances as his options start to dwindle, Jimmy is taught a painful lesson by one of the Commodores associates and Richard Harrow goes hunting in the forest

programme.title: Boardwalk Empire
programme.desc: Nucky orchestrates a risky liquor delivery in Philadelphia - but in Atlantic City, attorney general Daugherty encounters a problem that could complicate the electoral fraud investigation. Leander Whitlock, the Commodores lawyer, takes Jimmy under his wing, while Van Alden is plagued by his conscience as Lucy struggles to live in solitude

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Tyrions fate is decided as his champion Oberyn Martell faces against Gregor the Mountain Clegane in his trial by combat, while Moles Town is on the receiving end of a raid by the wildlings. Ramsay sends Theon into Moat Cailin to negotiate the surrender of the Ironborn troops holding the fort, Littlefinger and Sansa are questioned about the circumstances surrounding Lysas death and Barristan confronts Jorah about a document delivered to him. Fantasy drama, starring Peter Dinklage and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The men of the Nights Watch face their biggest challenge yet as they prepare to defend the Wall and Castle Black against attacks from the north and south by Mance Rayders wildling army, with Ygritte determined to be the one to kill Jon Snow. Sam gets some sage advice about love from Maester Aemon and is shocked when someone comes knocking at the gates seeking shelter. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington and directed by Neil Marshall, the man behind the second series episode depicting the Battle of the Blackwater

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: After meeting at the cornhole party, Clark quickly hits it off with Floyds wife Carol. Later, detectives Homer and Plumb dig deeper into Clarks relationship with Carol, and Floyds time on the DTF app

programme.title: The Time Travelers Wife
programme.desc: Henry and Clare try to reset with a second date, but she still struggles to rectify this Henry with the man she knows and loves. Starring Rose Leslie and Theo James

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: In the wake of the showdown, the members of the now-disbanded Task Force continue to seek answers. As the Dark Hearts mobilise to cover their tracks, a shocking revelation leads them to a final confrontation

programme.title: The Wire
programme.desc: McNulty and Daniels debate how to protect a key witness in the months before he testifies. Meanwhile, Sydnor and Carver track down the Barksdale crews main stash house, and Prez demonstrates his talent for following the paper trail. Proposition Joe brokers a meeting between Omar and Stringer, while an undercover operation has terrible consequences for one of the unit

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Bill breaks a taboo by protecting Sookie, who identified the man responsible for stealing from Fangtasia. Jason and Amy abduct a vampire to harvest his blood, and Tara consults with Miss Jeanette to cure her own problems. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin and Stephen Moyer

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon Snow heads into the wildling camp to try to negotiate a peace with Mance Rayder, but an unexpected arrival changes the situation at the Wall, while Daenerys is forced to make a decision about the dragons in Meereen. Cersei demands that Tywin call off her engagement to Loras Tyrell, Bran learns more about his destiny, and Tyrion receives a visit from Jaime as he awaits his fate. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: At Castle Black, Jon Snow struggles to mediate between wildling leader Mance Rayder and Stannis Baratheon, while a mournful Cersei continues to worry about the future of her son Tommen in Kings Landing. Tyrion arrives in a new location and is presented with a fresh opportunity and Daenerys grapples with the politics of power in Meereen, as well as her tempestuous dragons. Starring Kit Harington, Lena Headey, Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Walter attends his final session, and believes everything has worsened since his previous visit. He denies having a breakdown and reveals how his father never allowed him to to cry in front of his mother, even to mourn the death of his brother. Paul suggests he has created two versions of himself and that the real Walter does not wish to return to work, and the patient feels worried he has not lived his life for himself. Drama, starring John Mahoney and Gabriel Byrne

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: At Castle Black, Jon Snow struggles to mediate between wildling leader Mance Rayder and Stannis Baratheon, while a mournful Cersei continues to worry about the future of her son Tommen in Kings Landing. Tyrion arrives in a new location and is presented with a fresh opportunity and Daenerys grapples with the politics of power in Meereen, as well as her tempestuous dragons. Starring Kit Harington, Lena Headey, Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The House of Black and White
programme.desc: Arya arrives in Braavos, while Brienne and Pod run into trouble on the road, and Cersei fears for her daughters safety in Dorne as Ellaria Sand seeks revenge for her lover Oberyns death. Stannis has a proposal for Jon and an advisor tempts Daenerys. Fantasy drama, starring Maisie Williams, Lena Headey and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Queen Margaery spends time with her new husband King Tommen. Elsewhere, fugitive Tyrion and Varys walk the Long Bridge of Volantis, and in Braavos, Arya sees the Many-Faced God. Fantasy drama, starring Natalie Dormer and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: The Firm (1993)
programme.desc: Harvard law graduate Mitch is headhunted to work for a prestigious law firm, despite his wifes warnings that it is too good to be true. After two of his colleagues are murdered, Mitch is approached by the FBI and informed the company is controlled by the Mafia - leaving him in a deadly predicament. Thriller, adapted from the novel by John Grisham, starring Tom Cruise, Gene Hackman, Jeanne Tripplehorn and Holly Hunter

programme.title: Collateral (2004)
programme.desc: A Los Angeles taxi driver picks up a sharp-suited fare and is shocked when a dead body almost plunges through his windscreen during the first stop on the journey. The enigmatic passenger then reveals he is a hitman with four more contracts to carry out before the night is over, and forces the driver to help him. Michael Manns thriller, starring Tom Cruise and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: Lost in Translation (2003)
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppolas comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: A Star Is Born (2018)
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jacksons alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott

programme.title: Collateral (2004)
programme.desc: A Los Angeles taxi driver picks up a sharp-suited fare and is shocked when a dead body almost plunges through his windscreen during the first stop on the journey. The enigmatic passenger then reveals he is a hitman with four more contracts to carry out before the night is over, and forces the driver to help him. Michael Manns thriller, starring Tom Cruise and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke (1967)
programme.desc: A rebellious small-time crook is sent to a prison in the Deep South, where he becomes a hero in the eyes of his fellow convicts and a thorn in the sides of the warden and the guards by refusing to bow to authority. His defiance escalates when he receives news of his mothers death, and embarks on a series of failed escape attempts. Drama based on Donn Pearces novel, starring Paul Newman, George Kennedy, JD Cannon and Dennis Hopper

programme.title: Lee (2023)
programme.desc: American fashion model-turned-war photographer Lee Miller is determined to document the truth of the Nazi regime, and in spite of the odds stacked against female correspondents, she captures some of the most important images of the Second World War. Fact-based drama, starring Kate Winslet, Andy Samberg, Alexander Skarsgard and Marion Cotillard

programme.title: 28 Years Later (2025)
programme.desc: Decades since the rage virus took hold, the survivors live on a small island. When one of the group leaves on a mission into the mainland, he discovers secrets, wonders, and horrors that have mutated not only the infected but other survivors. Danny Boyles horror thriller sequel, starring Jodie Comer, Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Ralph Fiennes and Rocco Haynes

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning (2025)
programme.desc: IMF agent Ethan Hunt is in exile with both halves of the 3D cruciform key that can unlock the source code of rogue AI creation, the Entity. Hunt returns to London to reunite with Luther Stickell, Benji Dunn and former thief Grace. The Entitys human henchman, Gabriel, is still on the loose, so Hunt bolsters his ranks with vengeful French assassin Paris and US intelligence agent Theo Degas. Action thriller, starring Tom Cruise, Hayley Atwell, Ving Rhames, Simon Pegg and Esai Morales

programme.title: Pulp Fiction (1994)
programme.desc: A series of interlinked stories about the Los Angeles underworld. A hitman plays minder to his bosss wife, and he and his partner deal with a dead body following a mishap with a gun. Meanwhile, a washed-up boxer goes on the run after refusing to throw a fight, and two lovers plot a hold-up in a diner. Quentin Tarantinos crime drama, starring John Travolta, Samuel L Jackson, Uma Thurman, Bruce Willis, Ving Rhames, Tim Roth and Amanda Plummer

programme.title: Promising Young Woman (2020)
programme.desc: Medical-school dropout Cassie is traumatised by a tragic event in her past. Still living with her parents, and waiting tables at a cheap coffee shop to earn a living, she has found the perfect way to deal with the painful past, and seeks vengeance against those who crossed her path. Director Emerald Fennells Oscar-winning crime thriller, starring Carey Mulligan, Bo Burnham and Alison Brie

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke (1967)
programme.desc: A rebellious small-time crook is sent to a prison in the Deep South, where he becomes a hero in the eyes of his fellow convicts and a thorn in the sides of the warden and the guards by refusing to bow to authority. His defiance escalates when he receives news of his mothers death, and embarks on a series of failed escape attempts. Drama based on Donn Pearces novel, starring Paul Newman, George Kennedy, JD Cannon and Dennis Hopper

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game of Shadows (2011)
programme.desc: The detective investigates a series of seemingly unconnected crimes all around the world, and becomes convinced one man is behind them all - the elusive Professor Moriarty. He sets forth on an international journey to bring the evil mastermind to justice, but finds he is dealing with a foe who is his intellectual equal. Action thriller sequel, starring Robert Downey Jr, Jude Law, Noomi Rapace and Jared Harris

programme.title: Children of Men (2006)
programme.desc: In a future blighted by mass infertility, the human race is one generation from extinction and the world has plunged into chaos. In a totalitarian Britain, a jaded former activist tries to protect the first woman to become pregnant in nearly 20 years. However, a militant underground group plans to use her for its own ends. Thriller, starring Clive Owen, Michael Caine and Julianne Moore

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman (1982)
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso

programme.title: Batman (1989)
programme.desc: The masked avenger stalks the streets of Gotham City, waging a nightly war against the criminal element. However, he may have met his match when the citys crime syndicate is taken over by the crazed Joker, who plans to poison the populace with toxic chemicals. Tim Burtons comic-book adventure, starring Michael Keaton, Jack Nicholson and Kim Basinger

programme.title: Amadeus (1984)
programme.desc: Composer Antonio Salieri is a favoured artist in the court of Austrian emperor Joseph II, but he finds himself pushed aside in favour of Mozart. Salieri admires the younger maestros music, but is incensed that someone so vulgar and obnoxious should be gifted with such talent. As jealousy consumes him, he plots his rivals downfall. Period drama, adapted by Peter Shaffer from his own play and starring F Murray Abraham and Tom Hulce

programme.title: Children of Men (2006)
programme.desc: In a future blighted by mass infertility, the human race is one generation from extinction and the world has plunged into chaos. In a totalitarian Britain, a jaded former activist tries to protect the first woman to become pregnant in nearly 20 years. However, a militant underground group plans to use her for its own ends. Thriller, starring Clive Owen, Michael Caine and Julianne Moore

programme.title: Gravity (2013)
programme.desc: Two astronauts are left stranded in orbit above the Earth when the debris from an exploding satellite destroys their shuttle. Left drifting in space with no way to contact mission control, they begin a perilous journey to reach the safety of a space station before their oxygen supply runs out. Thriller, starring Sandra Bullock and George Clooney

programme.title: Interstellar (2014)
programme.desc: In the future, Earth has been devastated by an environmental catastrophe and will soon become incapable of supporting human life. A former astronaut is recruited to carry out a desperate mission - piloting the last remaining spacecraft through a wormhole in search of another planet that can become humanitys new home. Sci-fi drama, starring Matthew McConaughey, Anne Hathaway and Michael Caine

programme.title: Inception (2010)
programme.desc: A talented thief uses hi-tech devices to enter other peoples dreams so he can steal their secrets. An industrialist hires him to perform a far more challenging job - to implant an idea into a corporate heirs mind, so he will think it is his own. However, the mission is compromised by the thiefs own troubled psyche. Christopher Nolans sci-fi thriller, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Elliot Page, Joseph Gordon-Levitt and Tom Hardy

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange (1971)
programme.desc: Sadistic young gang leader Alex leads a carefree life indulging his love of rape, violence and classical music. When he is finally arrested, he is subjected to a sinister form of aversion therapy that brainwashes him into being physically unable to use violence. However, on his release, he finds friends and family have turned on him, while others seek to exploit him to further their political ends. Drama, starring Malcolm McDowell and Warren Clarke

programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Bone Lake (2024)
programme.desc: A couples holiday is upended when theyre forced to share a mansion with a mysterious couple, spiralling into a maze of sex, lies and manipulation. Comedy thriller, starring Alex Roe and Maddie Hasson

programme.title: The Gentleman (2025)
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman

programme.title: Plainclothes (2025)
programme.desc: An undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies orders when he falls for a target. Writer/director Carmen Emmis thriller, starring Tom Blyth, Russell Tovey and Maria Dizzia

programme.title: One More Shot (2025)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2025)
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been enemies for generations, young warrior Hiccup breaks tradition by forming an unlikely bond with Toothless, a feared Night Fury. Live action fantasy adventure, starring Mason Thames, Nico Parker and Gerard Butler

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer (2025)
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer (2025)
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: Bone Lake (2024)
programme.desc: A couples holiday is upended when theyre forced to share a mansion with a mysterious couple, spiralling into a maze of sex, lies and manipulation. Comedy thriller, starring Alex Roe and Maddie Hasson

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: King Ivory (2024)
programme.desc: Tulsa narcotics cop Layne West is locked in a battle with the citys criminal underworld. When his son becomes addicted to fentanyl, West teams up with his partner Ty and FBI agent Beatty to bring down those responsible. Thriller, starring James Badge Dale and Ben Foster

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Tina (2021)
programme.desc: Born Anna Mae Bullock in 1939, Tina Turner has sold in excess of 100 million records and earned numerous plaudits including Grammy awards and induction into the Rock And Roll Hall Of Fame with her first husband, Ike Turner. She was the first woman to grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine and dabbled in acting including a memorable performance opposite Mel Gibson in Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome. Following a prolonged period of ill health, Turner intends to retire from the spotlight with her second husband, Erwin Bach. She bids farewell to her fans in the emotional documentary Tina. Directed by Dan Lindsay and TJ Martin, the film invites the singer to reminisce about her turbulent life and career with glowing contributions from friends, family and fans including Oprah Winfrey and Angela Bassett

With its numerous castles and a fine cathedral, there are sure signs the Normans stamped their mark over the area. Tonys four-day walk traces the story of their conquest of the county, which he discovers was very different from the knockout victory at Hastings, involving a long, fiercely fought struggle

programme.desc: The latest recruit to join the team of 37 beefeaters begins his career with some testing exams. programme.desc: On September 1 1939 German forces invaded Poland as four Luftwaffe bomber groups attacked Warsaw. By September 6 the citys anti-aircraft defences had been reduced to a few guns and much of the Polish capital was in ruins. The bomber aircraft dominated the skies throughout the rest of the Second World War as fleets stood ready on the airfields of every combatant nation

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson heads to Guernsey and Jersey to tell the story of the islands surrender to the Nazis during the Second World War. In Guernsey, he hears of the first bombing raid that heralded the German troops arrival and sees the spot where the first-ever British commando landed in secret, only to see the planned revenge raid fail spectacularly. A ferry then takes him on to Jersey, where he finds almost all of its beaches have a bunker or a machine gun post left over from the conflict

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: The story of the Great Locomotive Chase - an attempt by northern spies to steal steam locomotive The General during the American Civil War

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: From the trench to the home-front hospital, a medical historian retraces the train journey made by wounded soldiers during the Second World War. Documentary series exploring the role of trains in the major conflicts of the past 150 years

programme.title: Bradley Walsh: Egypts Cosmic Code
programme.desc: The presenter and one-time Rolls Royce engineer fulfils a lifetimes ambition to visit the monuments of Ancient Egypt in a bid to understand how it could have been possible to produce such wonders of the ancient world 4,500 years ago. An expert guide is on hand to lay out the mainstream thinking and act as the perfect foil for Bradley and his theories

programme.title: Bradley Walsh: Egypts Cosmic Code
programme.desc: The presenter dives deeper into Egypts mysteries, exploring the Great Sphinx and the underground Serapeum with its precision-cut granite sarcophagi, questioning their purpose and links to the pyramid enigma. Travelling south, he visits the intricately designed Dendera Temple, where hieroglyphs and imagery hint at possible extraterrestrial connections. He concludes at the sprawling Karnak temple complex, marvelling at its monumental engineering, sphinx-lined avenues, and Hatshepsuts towering obelisk - wondering whether its simply a monument or a channel for cosmic energy

programme.title: Bradley Walsh: Egypts Cosmic Code
programme.desc: The presenter sets out to uncover the mysteries of King Tutankhamun. Along the way, he encounters the enigmatic Alien King Akhenaten and his wife, Nefertiti. Sailing down the Nile, he investigates how the Ancient Egyptians transported enormous stone blocks for their architectural marvels, including the 700-ton Colossi of Memnon. His quest then leads him into the Valley of the Kings, where he discovers the resting places of Akhenaten and King Tuts successor, Horemheb - before finally coming face to face with the mummy of the Boy King himself

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: When the team finds an artefact on Lot 8 that may date to medieval times, it leads them to another, massive discovery

programme.title: Death Coast
programme.desc: The Death Coast is an area of rough sea in the North Atlantic thats claimed more than 6,000 vessels across centuries. Many sailors braved these waters - some for trade, some for war and some for plunder. Gold and priceless objects from their wrecked ships now lie scattered across the ocean floor, but salvaging has been banned in the region several years. Now, after a long battle, shipwreck hunter Jeff Mackinnon has won exclusive rights to dive. He and his team have just 12 weeks to search the wrecks below the turbulent waves of the Death Coast make diving impossible

programme.title: Death Coast

programme.desc: Stories of UFO sightings, abductions and other paranormal events reported in the Southern Hemisphere. This episode focuses on Queenslands tropical coast where the rainforest meets the Great Barrier Reef. programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.sub-title: New Zealand and the Bass Strait
programme.desc: Untold stories of UFO sightings, abductions, and other paranormal events. The Bass Strait is a treacherous stretch of water that separates Tasmania from the Australian mainland. programme.title: Hitlers Handmaidens
programme.desc: The Second World War unleashed the full horror of the Nazis on Poland, the Baltic States, Ukraine and Russia. Approximately 500,000 German women served on the Eastern front and the settlement of conquered lands commenced. The colonisers death camps were established with support by secretaries, administrators, SS wives and female concentration camp guards. This episode explores how women were active participants and perpetrators in the war and its attendant atrocities - especially the Holocaust

Patrick Stewart stars

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: The team battles a deadly flesh-eating fungus that takes over any human it comes into contact with, turning the victims into a hideous shell of their former self. However, they face a race against time to destroy the creature before it spreads its lethal spores throughout the whole country, absorbing everyone it encounters and gaining in strength and momentum all the time. Starring Jason Flemyng and Hannah Spearritt

programme.desc: A laconic gunslinger, a ruthless hired killer and a conniving outlaw hunt for a cache of loot during the chaos of the American Civil War. However, each is privy to only part of the information necessary to find it, setting in motion a series of deadly betrayals. The third film in Sergio Leones Spaghetti Western trilogy, starring Clint Eastwood as the Man with No Name, with Lee Van Cleef and Eli Wallach. Featuring Ennio Morricones iconic soundtrack

programme.desc: A Kenyan ranger spends a week with a recently orphaned baby rhino in a bid to establish a gradual and very delicate exchange of trust that could save its life

programme.title: Ol Pejeta Diaries
programme.desc: As the staff help move a herd of hartebeest to another park, an ailing eland antelope is spotted, suffering from a wound caused by an illegal trap

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: In the Australian wilderness, the protection of young takes many forms. Sometimes its tender and other times its sharp claws.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: In the natural world, being talented can bring all sorts of advantages and Australia has no shortage of exceptional talent.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of staff at the RSPCA hospital in Brisbane, with one vet giving a koala mouth-to-mouth resuscitation, while another performs microsurgery on a fruit bat. A bath-averse python faces its fears and an owl is rescued

programme.title: Great Parks of Africa
programme.desc: The vast wildlife preserve in the Kalahari Desert region of Botswana and South Africa known as the Kgalagadi Transfrontier Park

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Pressure mounts as the season comes to a close. Clumsy climber Malika faces being held back a grade and Benis strict diet is more than he can handle

programme.title: Dogs with Extraordinary Jobs
programme.desc: How dogs are trained to use smell for life-saving conservation work and environmental policing. Featuring a South African dog helping to monitor endangered tortoises, a labrador who ensures that non-native zebra mussels do no damage to the habitats of Western Canada, and a whale scat detection dog, who plays a vital role in research into the decline of orca whales

programme.title: Survival of the Beast
programme.desc: Max Djenohan embarks on a mission to unlock and mimic the survival skills of some of the most charismatic animals on Earth

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: The powers of fire and ice collide in Iceland, actually Earths largest volcanic island. Take a journey to this country driven by the forces of nature

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: With approximately 130 active volcanos, volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer leads an expedition to Indonesia - arguably the most active place on Earth

programme.title: Invisible River: Under Water Between the Black Forest and the Vosges
programme.desc: A documentary about the largest groundwater reservoir in Europe, which forms an underground river in the Upper Rhine Valley. Underwater cameraman Serge Dumont capture footage of the inhabitants of this biotope

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: A former Marine sniper is coaxed back into action when government officials need his help to prevent an assassination attempt on the US president. However, the intended target is in fact an African archbishop, and the marksman is set up by double-crossing agents to take the fall, forcing him to go on the run as he fights to clear his name. Action thriller, with Mark Wahlberg, Michael Pena and Danny Glover

programme.title: White Elephant (2022)
programme.desc: An ex-Marine enforcer must battle his conscience and code of honour when he is forced to work for the Mob. Action thriller directed by Jesse V Johnson, starring Bruce Willis, Olga Kurylenko, John Malkovich and Michael Rooker

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: The Mechanic (2011)
programme.desc: A professional hitman lets his emotional detachment slip when his mentor is murdered, and puts his deadly skills to the task of getting revenge. The solitary assassin finds an ally in his teachers son, who also yearns for vengeance and persuades the killer to teach him the tricks of the trade. Action thriller remake, starring Jason Statham, Ben Foster and Donald Sutherland.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum (2007)
programme.desc: Amnesiac rogue assassin Jason Bournes long-buried memories are reawakened by a British journalist researching the secret organisation that was responsible for transforming him into a killing machine. Meanwhile, a ruthless CIA director becomes convinced Bourne is still a security risk, and plans to dispose of him once and for all. Third instalment of the spy thriller series, directed by Paul Greengrass and starring Matt Damon, Joan Allen, Julia Stiles, David Strathairn, Paddy Considine, Scott Glenn and Albert Finney

programme.title: Pitch Black (2000)
programme.desc: A spaceship crashes on a desolate alien planet inhabited by nocturnal predators. The creatures fear of light seems to guarantee the survivors safety - but when an eclipse takes place, they face a desperate struggle to survive. Their only hope lies with a convicted murderer, who is equally at home in the darkness - but is far from trustworthy. Sci-fi horror, starring Vin Diesel and Radha Mitchell

programme.title: Jackie Chans First Strike (1996)
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop delves into the murky world of international arms theft to track down a missing nuclear warhead - but the bad guys try to get him out of the way by framing him for murder. Martial arts adventure, starring Jackie Chan, Jackson Lou, Annie Wu, Bill Tung and Jouri Petrov. In Mandarin, Cantonese, English, Russian and Ukrainian

programme.title: Enter the Dragon (1973)
programme.desc: A powerful crime kingpin hosts a martial arts tournament on his island lair. A former Shaolin monk is recruited by an intelligence agency to enter the tournament and expose the crime lords opium and slavery rings. He finds himself fighting for his life alongside two Vietnam veterans who are both fleeing their own enemies. Thriller, starring Bruce Lee, John Saxon, Jim Kelly and Kien Shih

programme.title: Constantine (2005)
programme.desc: Exorcist John Constantine is cursed with the ability to see spirits stalking the Earth, and grudgingly takes on the forces of evil, hoping his actions will earn him a place in heaven. However, he is told he has terminal cancer and time for salvation is running out - unless a policewoman investigating her twin sisters death can find the key to saving his soul. Supernatural thriller, starring Keanu Reeves, Rachel Weisz and Tilda Swinton

programme.title: Justice League (2017)
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Supermans selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists the help of newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater enemy. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to find and recruit a team of meta-humans to stand against supervillain Steppenwolf, but despite the help of Aquaman, Cyborg and The Flash, it may already be too late to save the planet. Sci-fi adventure, starring Ben Affleck, Gal Gadot and Henry Cavill

programme.title: Demolition Man (1993)
programme.desc: Maverick cop John Spartan is frozen alive in 1996 and held in cryonic suspension for a crime he did not commit. Decades into the future, the dictator of a seemingly utopian city unleashes a criminal psychopath against his political enemy - but he proves impossible to control, forcing the authorities to revive Spartan to defeat him. Sci-fi thriller, with Sylvester Stallone, Wesley Snipes, Sandra Bullock and Nigel Hawthorne

programme.title: Blade (1998)
programme.desc: A half-vampire possesses all the strengths inherent in bloodsuckers with none of their weaknesses, and is determined to wipe the monsters from the face of the Earth. However, he faces a deadly new threat in a renegade vampire who is close to decoding an ancient prophecy that will allow him to repopulate the world with his kind. Action thriller, starring Wesley Snipes, Stephen Dorff and Kris Kristofferson

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5 (2011)
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBIs top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster

programme.title: The Mechanic (2011)
programme.desc: A professional hitman lets his emotional detachment slip when his mentor is murdered, and puts his deadly skills to the task of getting revenge. The solitary assassin finds an ally in his teachers son, who also yearns for vengeance and persuades the killer to teach him the tricks of the trade. Action thriller remake, starring Jason Statham, Ben Foster and Donald Sutherland.

programme.title: Rampage (2018)
programme.desc: When three different animals become infected with a dangerous pathogen, a primatologist and a geneticist team up to stop them from destroying Chicago. Fantasy adventure, starring Dwayne Johnson, Naomie Harris and Malin Akerman

programme.title: Jackie Chans First Strike (1996)
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop delves into the murky world of international arms theft to track down a missing nuclear warhead - but the bad guys try to get him out of the way by framing him for murder. Martial arts adventure, starring Jackie Chan, Jackson Lou, Annie Wu, Bill Tung and Jouri Petrov. In Mandarin, Cantonese, English, Russian and Ukrainian

programme.title: Street Fighter (1994)
programme.desc: A military officer goes in search of a power-mad general who is holding several hostages in a secret location. He soon finds he is not the only one on the maniacs trail, and joins forced with a mismatched band of martial artists to save the captives. Action adventure based on the video game, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Raul Julia, Kylie Minogue and Ming-Na Wen

programme.title: Mad Max (1979)
programme.desc: In the near future, Australian cop Max Rockatansky tires of battling to impose law and order on the roads and turns in his badge - only to be forced out of retirement when his wife and child are murdered at the hands of a motorcycle gang. George Millers action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Joanne Samuel and Hugh Keays-Byrne

Action thriller, starring Jason Statham, Jeremy Irons, Minnie Driver and Jemma Redgrave
